name: Deep Sea Artisan
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>深</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>海</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のアーチザン
desc: If this card is added from the Deck or GY to your hand by an effect of a WATER monster: You can reveal this card; look at your opponent's hand. If this card is Special Summoned: You can send the top card of your Deck to the GY, then target 1 Level 4 or lower WATER monster in your GY, except "Deep Sea Artisan"; Special Summon it, but negate its effects. You can only use each effect of "Deep Sea Artisan" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is added from the Deck or GY to your hand by an effect of a WATER monster: You can reveal this card; look at your opponent's hand. If this card is Special Summoned: You can send the top card of your Deck to the GY, then target 1 Level 4 or lower WATER monster in your GY, except "Deep Sea Artisan"; Special Summon it, but negate its effects. You can only use each effect of "Deep Sea Artisan" once per turn.
eff: If this card is added from the Deck or GY to your hand by an effect of a WATER monster: You can reveal this card; look at your opponent's hand. If this card is Special Summoned: You can send the top card of your Deck to the GY, then target 1 Level 4 or lower WATER monster in your GY, except "Deep Sea Artisan"; Special Summon it, but negate its effects. You can only use each effect of "Deep Sea Artisan" once per turn.

action: Activates if added to the hand
Reveals itself in the hand for cost
Sends from the top of your Deck to your Graveyard for cost
mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
